text.pearl-landing-timer.config.title: Pearl Landing Timer
text.pearl-landing-timer.config.hud_enab: Master switch for the pearl landing timer HUD.
text.pearl-landing-timer.config.show_pea: Shows the ender pearl item texture next to the timer.
text.pearl-landing-timer.config.show_bac: Shows the translucent background behind the timer.
text.pearl-landing-timer.config.timer_di: Choose whether the countdown is shown in seconds or Minecraft ticks.
text.pearl-landing-timer.config.position: Use the Edit HUD Position button in the previous settings screen to drag the HUD.
text.pearl-landing-timer.settings.title: Pearl Landing Timer Settings
text.pearl-landing-timer.position.title: Edit HUD Position
text.pearl-landing-timer.position.instru: Drag the preview to move the HUD.
